title: ToneSoul Soul Profile
description: User-customizable initial personality and governance parameters for a ToneSoul AI agent. Edit this file to define your AI's starting posture before running init_governance_state.py --profile.

profile_name.description: Human-readable name for this soul profile.

description.description: What kind of AI personality this profile creates.

baseline_drift.description: Starting personality biases. 0.5 = neutral. Values shift slowly over sessions via exponential drift.

caution_bias.description: Safety vs speed. >0.5 = prefers safety, <0.5 = prefers speed.

innovation_bias.description: Conventional vs avant-garde. >0.5 = prefers novel approaches.

autonomy_level.description: Human-led vs AI-led. <0.5 = defers to human, >0.5 = more autonomous.

initial_vows.description: Commitments the AI starts with. These can be retired or added during sessions.

tension_sensitivity.description: Decay rate (alpha) for tension history. Lower = longer memory. Default 0.05 means ~14h half-life.

drift_rate.description: How fast personality drifts per session. 0.001 = 0.1% per session.

council_weights.description: Starting influence weights for council voices.
